MODEL 1 All-in-One Store — Agents, Skills & Sources in one browsable catalog with 3 tabs

Built by Microsoft
Sales AgentDrive deals forward with clear insights and ready-to-use actions.
Planner AgentAll your tasks and projects in one simple, familiar experience.
Researcher AgentFast insights to prep for your next meeting.
Visual Creator AgentCreate stunning visuals with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Analyst AgentTurn complex data into quick, easy-to-read answers.
Summarize SkillCondense documents and threads into key points.
Employee Self Service AgentAssists employees by providing responses based on official policies.
Web Search SkillDeep web search with citations and source verification.
RFP Generator AgentBuild an RFP like a Microsoft Pro and turn existing notes into a submission.
Available Sources
ServiceNow SourceIT service management, tickets, and knowledge base.
Confluence SourceWiki pages and team documentation from Atlassian.
Google Drive SourceFiles and documents from Google Workspace.
HubSpot SourceMarketing automation, CRM, and sales pipeline.
Notion SourceNotes, docs, and project management workspace.
Slack SourceTeam messages, channels, and shared files.
